footer.tagline: Making healthcare services affordable and accessible for rural communities across India.
footer.address: Kali Road, Kathaicha Chauraha, Nath Nagar, Sant Kabir Nagar, UP - 272176

form.name: Your Name
form.consent: I consent to Digiswasthya collecting my details.

hero.subtitle: Bridging the gap between rural India and modern medicine through expert teleconsultation and essential diagnostics at your doorstep.

services.description: We provide a full spectrum of healthcare services directly to underserved communities, ensuring quality care is accessible to all.

checkups.title: Health Checkups
checkups.description: Comprehensive screenings in rural areas to identify symptoms, perform physical exams, and monitor vital signs for early disease detection.

teleconsultation.title: Teleconsultation
teleconsultation.description: Connecting rural patients with specialist doctors via high-speed video links, bridging the gap between villages and urban medical centers.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.description: Providing essential lab tests and diagnostic tools on-site, ensuring patients receive accurate results without traveling long distances.

referrals.title: Referrals
referrals.description: Guidance and seamless referral pathways to trusted secondary and tertiary hospitals for specialized surgery or advanced treatments.

impact.title: Measurable Impact.
impact.description: Our data-driven approach ensures that every rupee donated translates into direct medical intervention for those who need it most.

donateSection.title: DONATE FOR THE CAUSE!
donateSection.description: As of January 2026, DigiSwasthya has been able to facilitate 117,644+ teleconsultations, and many of these have been financed by our valuable donors. You can join our patron program through which a monthly contribution from you would be directed towards funding a few consultations.
donateSection.boxText: You can sponsor teleconsultations for four patients by donating a sum of

bmi.title: BMI Health Assessment
bmi.subtitle: Understand your Body Mass Index and take informed steps toward better health.
bmi.disclaimer: This tool is for general health awareness and does not replace medical advice.

bmiCalculator.readySub: Enter your height and weight to see your health category.

messages.underweight: Your BMI is in the underweight range. Consider consulting a healthcare provider for personalized nutritional advice.
messages.normal: Great job! Your BMI is within the healthy range. Maintain a balanced diet and regular physical activity to stay healthy.
messages.overweight: Your BMI is in the overweight range. Small changes in diet and regular exercise can help you reach a healthier weight.
messages.obese: Your BMI is in the obese range. We recommend consulting a healthcare professional to discuss a personalized health plan.

award.quote: "DigiSwasthya aims 'Making healthcare services affordable and accessible for rural communities across India by leveraging technology'"
award.description: Our commitment to transparency and impact has been recognized by leading institutions. This award serves as a testament to our dedicated team and the rural families we serve every day.
